file_insights.description: Comprehensive test data generation module for multiple data models

patterns_discovered: Factory function pattern for generating mock test data
Consistent ID generation with incrementing counter
Flexible object creation with optional overrides
gotchas_discovered: Potential ID collision if resetIdCounter() is not used between test suites
Heavy reliance on random generation might lead to non-deterministic tests
Large number of optional fields could make test data creation complex

approach_outcome.description: Set up test infrastructure with Vitest mocks for Drizzle database client

recommendations: Add comprehensive documentation for each factory function
Implement stricter type constraints for mock data generation
Create utility methods to generate predictable test scenarios
Consider adding seed data generation for consistent testing
Add validation to ensure generated mock data matches schema constraints
